container.get.description: Locate a child element scoped within a container element.

to.equal.description: Assert deep equality between actual and expected values.

foundRequest.should.description: Assert on a captured intercepted network request.

merchants.forEach.description: Iterate over a collection of merchants.

files.map.description: Transform a list of files into a derived collection.

productOffers.children.description: Read child nodes of a product offers structure.

productOffer.find.description: Find a single product offer within a collection.

commentsToAdd.forEach.description: Iterate over comments queued to be added.

body.text.description: Read the text content of a response or element body.

text.includes.description: Check whether a text string contains a substring.

to.eq.description: Assert strict equality between actual and expected values.

data.some.description: Test whether any element in a collection satisfies a predicate.

to.include.description: Assert that a value or collection includes the expected item.

searchTermValid.toLowerCase.description: Normalize a string to lower case.

Date.now.description: Return the current epoch timestamp in milliseconds.

el.val.description: Read the value of a form element.

checkbox.is.description: Test the state of a checkbox (checked/disabled/etc.).

statuses.forEach.description: Iterate over a collection of statuses.

status.toLowerCase.description: Normalize a status string to lower case.

businessUnits.forEach.description: Iterate over a collection of business units.

url.includes.description: Check whether a URL contains the expected substring.

assert.isTrue.description: Assert that a value is strictly true.

uuid.toString.description: Coerce a value (UUID) to its string representation.
